name: example-hackernews-ai
description: Example: Monitor HN for AI-related posts using LLM matching

match.value: 页面中是否有与AI、大模型、GPT、Claude、LLM、机器学习相关的重要新闻或讨论？排除评论区闲聊。

_llm_match_how_it_works: Cron agent runs 'fetch --event example-hackernews-ai', reads the extracted text, and uses its own LLM to decide if content matches. No external API call needed — the agent IS the LLM.
